## Accepted

- `fr-7-4d952349`

## Rejected

## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-7-4d952349`

finding_summary: The new bead-alias matching only adds the milestone prefix when the bead id contains no dot, so short-form ids like `8.5.3` are treated as already-qualified and no longer match `9ni.8.5.3` [src/contexts/milestone_record/bead_refs.rs:8-15]. That bad canonicalization now feeds `TaskRunEntry::same_attempt()` / `canonical_task_run_bead_ref()` and `FsTaskRunLineageStore::find_runs_for_bead()`, so mixed short/qualified task-run rows for the same bead will not collapse together and `bead_execution_history()` can return duplicate or missing attempts for the dot-separated bead ids this repo actually uses [src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs:452-472, src/adapters/fs.rs:5173-5183]. severity: high. affected_files: ["src/contexts/milestone_record/bead_refs.rs", "src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs", "src/adapters/fs.rs"]. remediation_hint: canonicalize short dotted aliases against the current milestone instead of treating every dotted id as foreign/fully-qualified, and add coverage for a real alias pair such as `9ni.8.5.3` versus `8.5.3`.
